title: The Iron Blockade
summary: Desperate and hunted, the heroes flee to Batuu — the smuggler's haven at the edge of the Western Reaches. To stop Leviathan's demonstration strike on Malpaz, they need a fleet. That means convincing Oga Garra, the Blutopian crime boss who controls Black Spire Outpost, that Leviathan is bad for everyone's business — including hers.

gearNotes.reason: Breaking a blockade means ship combat and damage. Repair under fire is the difference between escape and destruction.
Coordinating a blockade breakthrough requires secure comms. Imperial signals intelligence is actively monitoring all traffic.
Siege warfare and breakthrough combat. Sustained fighting with no safe harbor.
Siege conditions may require improvised repairs, jury-rigged defenses, or sabotage of Imperial siege equipment.
Imperial blockade means heavy droid deployment — probe droids for reconnaissance, security droids for enforcement.
Ground-level breakthrough scenes. Covering movement under Imperial fire.
Breaking through entrenched Imperial positions during the breakthrough.
Avoiding Imperial sensor nets during the blockade approach. Stealth is survival.
Sustained combat across the siege and breakthrough. No downtime between engagements.
